description: Opt-in workflow/risk profile template for repositories using AI-assisted development. It tightens the places where generative output most often drifts: duplication, complexity, generic bloat, and unfinished stubs. Best for teams that want AI-assisted mode to be explicit, visible in the vector, and enforced through normal preset mechanics rather than a hidden switch.

preset_profile.summary: AI-assisted development risk posture; inactive until applied to a repository vector.
